concepts.label: Atomic Habits
concepts.summary: Tiny, consistent improvements that compound into remarkable results over time.

concepts.label: The Habit Loop
concepts.summary: The four-step pattern: cue → craving → response → reward that governs all habits.

concepts.label: Identity-Based Habits
concepts.summary: Building habits by first deciding what kind of person you want to become.

concepts.label: Marginal Gains
concepts.summary: The philosophy of seeking 1% improvements in every area to create compounding advantages.

concepts.label: Implementation Intention
concepts.summary: An 'if-then' plan that specifies when, where, and how you will perform a habit.

concepts.label: Habit Stacking
concepts.summary: Linking a new habit to an existing one using the formula: After I [current habit], I will [new habit].
